# serval_user (Data Source)



## Example Usage

```terraform
# Query by ID
data "serval_user" "example_user_by_id" {
  id = "id"
}

# Query by email
data "serval_user" "example_user_by_email" {
  email = "user@example.com"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `email` (String)
- `find_one_by` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--find_one_by))

### Read-Only

- `auth_method` (String) Specifies the authentication method for a user. If unset, the org default applies.
 Set to MAGIC_LINK to allow the user to bypass SSO (e.g. guest or break-glass accounts).
Available values: "USER_AUTH_METHOD_UNSPECIFIED", "USER_AUTH_METHOD_MAGIC_LINK".
- `avatar_url` (String)
- `created_at` (String) A timestamp in RFC 3339 format (e.g., "2025-01-15T01:30:15Z").
- `deactivated_at` (String) A timestamp in RFC 3339 format (e.g., "2025-01-15T01:30:15Z").
- `first_name` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `last_name` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `role` (String) Available values: "USER_ROLE_UNSPECIFIED", "USER_ROLE_ORG_MEMBER", "USER_ROLE_ORG_ADMIN", "USER_ROLE_ORG_GUEST".
- `timezone` (String) IANA timezone, e.g., "America/New_York"

<a id="nestedatt--find_one_by"></a>
### Nested Schema for `find_one_by`

Optional:

- `include_deactivated` (Boolean) Whether to include deactivated users in the response.
